title: podochilus reflexus
intro: Podochilus reflexus, also known as the reflexed Podochilus, is a plant species in the family Orchidaceae. This plant is reported to have medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Podochilus reflexus include its potential to treat fever, wounds, and other infections, as well as its use in pain relief and as an antiseptic. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
